features: Luxury 300ml hand wash gently cleanses hands
Luxury 300ml hand & body lotion to moisturise and delicately fragrance the hands
Baylis & Harding's iconic Jojoba, Vanilla & Almond Oil fragrance
description: Product Description A stylish luxury hand care set to leave your hands beautifully cleansed, moisturised and softly scented. This gift set is the perfect stocking filler for a loved one who loves a feminine aesthetic. Feminine blends of jojoba, rich vanilla and sweet almond oil characterise this beautifully opulent collection. Inspired by trending astrological beauty aesthetics, our Jojoba, Vanilla & Almond oil collection is brought to life through sustainable metallics, multi-faceted shimmers and a celestial colour palette of frosted pink and warm peach, complimented with a holographic foil. Glamourous and luxurious, our most indulgent fragrance. Gentle notes of vanilla have been blended with subtle notes of almond oil and the sweetness of jojoba to create a truly sensuous and alluring fragrance. Ingredients HAND WASH: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Vanillin.HAND & BODY LOTION: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Coumarin, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Vanillin. Directions Hand Wash - Lather And Rinse. Hand & Body Lotion - Massage Gently Into Skin Until Fully Absorbed. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. See more
